overall.description: A nighttime scene from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) set in an industrial outskirts area. The clip begins with a view of the night sky as a futuristic flying vehicle passes overhead, then transitions to a first-person perspective walking along a dirt path beside a large industrial warehouse, approaching a distant illuminated complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial outskirts under night sky

events.description: futuristic aerodyne vehicle enters frame from the right
camera tilts upward to track the passing vehicle against the moon
camera pans down from sky view to ground level

agents.ego_description: standing still looking up at the night sky, tracking the illuminated flying vehicle as it passes overhead

notable_agents.action: futuristic aerodyne vehicle with multiple lights flying from right to left across the sky

entered.detail: bright full moon glowing in the clear night sky
large illuminated futuristic aircraft with running lights and advertising displays
sprawling illuminated industrial structures visible on the horizon
distant industrial structure with distinctive red warning lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a clear night sky with a bright full moon. A futuristic flying vehicle enters from the right and passes overhead, its lights illuminating the darkness. The camera tracks the vehicle's movement before beginning to pan down toward the ground.

events.description: begins walking forward along the dirt path at steady pace

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path next to a large industrial warehouse, moving toward the distant lights

entered.detail: massive concrete industrial building with sloped roof and exterior floodlights
unpaved dirt road with visible tire tracks and sparse vegetation
metal safety railing running along the edge of the building

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward along a dirt path beside a large illuminated industrial warehouse. The flying vehicle and moon are no longer in view as the focus shifts to the ground-level environment. The distant industrial complex becomes more prominent ahead as the camera advances steadily.

events.description: red-lit industrial building becomes visible on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the path, approaching the distant illuminated complex with the industrial warehouse still alongside

entered.detail: industrial structure with prominent red warning lights, previously seen in the distance

segments.scene_description: The walk continues through the industrial outskirts as the distant complex draws nearer. The red-lit building emerges on the left side of the frame, revealing itself to be the same structure glimpsed at the start. The warehouse remains on the right while the path leads toward the bright lights of the distant facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a gaze at the night sky before descending into a walk through a dimly lit industrial wasteland. It begins by tracking a futuristic flying vehicle as it glides across a clear, moonlit sky, its lights cutting through the darkness. As the camera pans down, the celestial view gives way to a ground-level perspective moving steadily along a dirt path beside a massive, illuminated industrial warehouse. The scene then expands as the camera advances further into the outskirts, drawing the distant, glowing lights of a facility into sharper focus. Finally, the path leads toward the bright complex as a red-lit building emerges on the left, framing the approach to the industrial heart of the area.
